zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Bruley於1243年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾希頓 武安德 希爾時，他的父親Richard de Bruley33歲，母親Mrs. Millicent De Bruley28歲。他於大約1269年與Katherine Foliot在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1305年4月15日在英國奧可福爾享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Brûlé (see Brule ). This surname is also found in Britain, where it is of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Brule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Lucien, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Monique, Normand, Phillippe, Pierre, Raoul, Yvan, Yves.

topographic name for someone living in a place cleared for use by burning, from brûlé ‘burnt’ (Old French bruslé, past participle of brusler ‘to burn’). Some instances of the name may derive from the same word used with reference to disfigurement by burning, either accidentally or as a medieval ordeal or punishment.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Bruley was born on 2 February 1243, in Ashton under Hill, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Bruley, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. Millicent De Bruley, was 28. He married Katherine Foliot about 1269, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 15 April 1305, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 62.

Il a épousé Katherine Foliot environ 1269, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 15 avril 1305, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.Ashton under Hill, Worcestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 애슈턴 운더 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Bruley(이)가 1243년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 애슈턴 운더 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Bruley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Millicent De Bruley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1269년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Katherine Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1305년 4월 15일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ashton under Hill, Worcestershire, Engla: аштон ундир хилл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Bruley родился 2 февраля 1243 г. в местности аштон ундир хилл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Bruley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Millicent De Bruley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Foliot около 1269 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 15 апреля 1305 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
